text:
Brigitte Morris was a member of the Garrison.

Appearance

Brigitte was a short woman with graying hair. She had a weathered face and was fit for her age. Brigitte wore the standard uniform of the Garrison.

Personality

Brigitte was extremely dedicated to her job, having seen firsthand what Titans could do when she served as part of the Garrison during the Colossal and Armored Titans attack at Shiganshina District. She was tough, but fair to the soldiers who served under her and this gave her a good working relationship with the rest of the Garrison, even Jax. Despite her position, Brigitte was willing to indulge her soldiers to a certain point, such as letting Squad 13 kill Titans on the sly, but she also knew when it was best to reassign them to a more suitable purpose.
